func:
msg.payload = [
    { 
        "id": "holy_basil", 
        "name": "Holy Basil (Kaphrao / กะเพรา)", 
        "description": "Essential Thai herb with a spicy, peppery flavor, famously used in Pad Kaphrao. Loves heat and sunlight.",
        "waterFrequency": "Daily (keep soil consistently moist but not soggy)", 
        "lightRequirement": "Full sun to partial shade", 
        "soilType": "Well-draining, nutrient-rich loamy soil",
        "fertilizer": "Every 2 weeks with a high-nitrogen organic fertilizer", 
        "commonIssues": "Wilting from underwatering, aphids on new growth",
        "growthRate": "Fast", 
        "maxHeight": "1-2 feet",
        "light": { "min": 4000, "max": 10000 },
        "humidity": { "min": 50, "max": 80 },
        "temperature": { "min": 22, "max": 35 }
    },
    { 
        "id": "thai_chili", 
        "name": "Bird's Eye Chili (Prik Kee Noo / พริกขี้หนู)", 
        "description": "Small but highly pungent chili peppers that are fundamental to Thai curry pastes and salads.",
        "waterFrequency": "When the top inch of soil is dry (do not overwater)", 
        "lightRequirement": "Full direct sun", 
        "soilType": "Sandy, well-draining potting mix",
        "fertilizer": "Monthly (use tomato/pepper specific fertilizer when blooming)", 
        "commonIssues": "Root rot from overwatering, flower drop if too hot/dry",
        "growthRate": "Medium", 
        "maxHeight": "2-3 feet",
        "light": { "min": 5000, "max": 12000 },
        "humidity": { "min": 50, "max": 75 },
        "temperature": { "min": 20, "max": 35 }
    },
    { 
        "id": "lemongrass", 
        "name": "Lemongrass (Takhrai / ตะไคร้)", 
        "description": "Fragrant grass with a citrusy aroma, heavily used in Tom Yum soup. Very resilient.",
        "waterFrequency": "Every 1-2 days (loves water)", 
        "lightRequirement": "Full direct sun", 
        "soilType": "Rich, moisture-retaining soil",
        "fertilizer": "High-nitrogen fertilizer every 2-3 weeks", 
        "commonIssues": "Rust fungus (if leaves stay wet), stunted growth from lack of sun",
        "growthRate": "Fast", 
        "maxHeight": "3-5 feet",
        "light": { "min": 6000, "max": 12000 },
        "humidity": { "min": 60, "max": 85 },
        "temperature": { "min": 25, "max": 35 }
    },
    { 
        "id": "coriander", 
        "name": "Coriander/Cilantro (Phak Chi / ผักชี)", 
        "description": "Delicate herb where both leaves and roots are used. It prefers slightly cooler conditions than other Thai herbs.",
        "waterFrequency": "Regularly to keep soil slightly moist", 
        "lightRequirement": "Morning sun, afternoon shade (can bolt/flower quickly in intense heat)", 
        "soilType": "Light, well-draining soil",
        "fertilizer": "Liquid organic fertilizer every 2 weeks", 
        "commonIssues": "Bolting (going to seed too fast) from heat stress, powdery mildew",
        "growthRate": "Fast", 
        "maxHeight": "1-2 feet",
        "light": { "min": 2000, "max": 6000 },
        "humidity": { "min": 50, "max": 75 },
        "temperature": { "min": 15, "max": 28 }
    },
    { 
        "id": "spring_onion", 
        "name": "Spring Onion (Ton Hom / ต้นหอม)", 
        "description": "A fast-growing essential Thai garnish. Very easy to grow in pots but has shallow roots that dry out quickly.",
        "waterFrequency": "Regularly keep the soil moist but not soggy", 
        "lightRequirement": "Full sun to partial shade", 
        "soilType": "Loose, well-draining soil",
        "fertilizer": "Liquid nitrogen fertilizer every 2 weeks", 
        "commonIssues": "Bulb rot from overwatering, yellowing tips from nutrient lack",
        "growthRate": "Fast", 
        "maxHeight": "1-2 feet",
        "light": { "min": 3000, "max": 8000 },
        "humidity": { "min": 50, "max": 75 },
        "temperature": { "min": 20, "max": 32 }
    },
    { 
        "id": "lime", 
        "name": "Lime (Manao / มะนาว)", 
        "description": "The crucial sour flavor in Thai cooking. Requires excellent drainage and lots of sunlight to produce fruit.",
        "waterFrequency": "Deep watering, then let the top 2 inches dry out completely", 
        "lightRequirement": "Full direct sun", 
        "soilType": "Sandy, loamy citrus mix with excellent drainage",
        "fertilizer": "Citrus fertilizer every 1-2 months", 
        "commonIssues": "Leaf miners (curled leaves), root rot, flower drop",
        "growthRate": "Medium", 
        "maxHeight": "3-5 feet (in pots)",
        "light": { "min": 6000, "max": 12000 },
        "humidity": { "min": 50, "max": 80 },
        "temperature": { "min": 22, "max": 35 }
    }
];

return msg;
